caption: A man with a shaved head and a beard, wearing a white t-shirt and large black over-ear headphones, sits in a recording studio in front of a dark, ribbed acoustic foam wall. A silver professional microphone, mounted on a boom arm with the text " Rode NT1-A" visible on the stand, is positioned close to his face. Throughout the sequence, the man is speaking, his facial expression shifting from an open-mouthed look of surprise or emphasis to a more concentrated expression. In the later frames, he begins to gesture with his right arm, which is tattooed, moving his hand across the lower part of the frame in a blurring motion. The background and equipment remain stationary while the man's head moves slightly and his hand enters the foreground.
